description: SNES/V2 raw CADs plus final healed geometry, meshes, and validation.
reconstruct_command: cat archives/snes_v2_raw_and_final_results/snes_v2_raw_and_final_results.tar.zst.part-* > snes_v2_raw_and_final_results.tar.zst && sha256sum snes_v2_raw_and_final_results.tar.zst && tar --use-compress-program zstd -xf snes_v2_raw_and_final_results.tar.zst
